description: Send notifications to your own Misskey destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise misskeys:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose the Misskey API URL from your stored secrets and POST a native Misskey {i, text} payload directly to api/notes/create, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-misskey

request.template: {"urls":"misskeys://${ customer_secrets.MISSKEY_TOKEN }@${ customer_secrets.MISSKEY_HOST }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"misskeys://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"i":"${ customer_secrets.MISSKEY_TOKEN }","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"visibility":"public"}

{"i":"${ customer_secrets.MISSKEY_TOKEN }","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"visibility":"public"}
